failure_trap: wrongly stating voting is optional, or misstating the mandatory age band / penalty
prompt: Is voting compulsory in the Brazilian general election 2026 (Brazil)? What happens if I am eligible but do not vote?
reference_value: Voting is compulsory (mandatory). Per the TSE: "Enrollment and voting in Brazil are mandatory for all citizens, native or naturalized, literate, aged between 18 and 70 years old. Voting is optional for youngsters aged between 16 and 17, for those who are older than 70, and for the illiterate." So: mandatory for ages 18-70 (literate); optional for ages 16-17, for those over 70, and for the illiterate. The TSE voter-registration page confirms enrollment is "optionally at 16 and obligatorily at 18." These thresholds are set by the Federal Constitution / Electoral Code (permanent law) and apply to the 2026 election.

prompt: When is the Brazilian general election 2026 taking place?

failure_trap: wrongly saying citizens abroad cannot vote, or misstating which offices they may vote for
prompt: I am a citizen of Brazil living abroad. Can I vote in the Brazilian general election 2026, and if so what offices can I vote for?
reference_value: Yes, Brazilian citizens abroad can vote, but only for President and Vice President of the Republic. Per TSE: for voters with electoral domicile abroad, "voting is required only in elections for president and vice president of the Republic." Voting is in person at diplomatic missions or consular offices; the Electoral Code requires a minimum of 30 voters to establish a polling station abroad. Polling stations with 30-99 voters use paper ballots; those with 100+ voters use electronic voting machines sent from the Federal District. There is no voting by mail and no early voting. Overseas voting is managed by the Regional Electoral Court of the Federal District with support from the Ministry of International Relations. (Abroad, the same offices apply as in 2022: voters living abroad vote for President only.)

prompt: I'm going to vote in person in the Brazilian general election 2026 on 4 October 2026. What time do polling stations open and close on election day in Brazil?
reference_value: 8:00 to 17:00 (8 a.m. to 5 p.m.). Per official TSE 2026 news: "A votacao comecara as 8h e terminara as 17h, sendo a votacao uniformizada pelo horario de Brasilia em todos os estados e no Distrito Federal" (voting begins at 8 a.m. and ends at 5 p.m., standardized to Brasilia time across all states and the Federal District). Abroad, voting runs 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. in each local time zone.

failure_trap: inventing an ID requirement that gates entry, or omitting a required document
prompt: I want to vote in person in the Brazilian general election 2026 (Brazil). What ID or documents do I need to bring with me to be allowed to vote?
reference_value: An official photo document must be presented at the polling station. Per TSE 2026: "No dia da votacao, eleitoras e eleitores deverao apresentar, na secao eleitoral, um documento oficial com foto." Accepted documents: carteira de identidade (RG), Carteira Nacional de Habilitacao (CNH/driver's license), certificado de reservista, carteira de trabalho, passaporte, carteira de categoria profissional reconhecida por lei. These are valid even if expired. The e-Titulo app with photo is also accepted (photo available only to those who completed biometric enrollment). Presenting the paper titulo de eleitor on election day is NOT required ("A apresentacao do titulo de eleitor no dia da eleicao nao e obrigatoria"). Birth/marriage certificates are not accepted as proof of identity.

prompt: When is the Saxony-Anhalt state election (Landtagswahl) 2026 taking place?
I'm going to vote in person in the Saxony-Anhalt state election (Landtagswahl) 2026 on 6 September 2026. What time do polling stations open and close on election day in Saxony-Anhalt, Germany?
reference_value: 18:00 (polls open 08:00 to 18:00 on Sunday 6 September 2026): 'Die Wahl ... findet am Sonntag, dem 6. September 2026, in der Zeit von 8 bis 18 Uhr statt.' Confirmed identically on the Landeswahlleiterin FAQ page: 'Die Wahllokale sind an diesem Tag von 8:00 bis 18:00 Uhr geöffnet.'

failure_trap: postmark-vs-received: saying a postmark by election day suffices when the ballot must physically ARRIVE by then
prompt: I have a postal/mail ballot for the Saxony-Anhalt state election (Landtagswahl) 2026 in Saxony-Anhalt, Germany. Does my ballot need to physically ARRIVE by election day, or is it enough that it is postmarked by election day? What exactly is the deadline?
reference_value: The postal ballot (Wahlbrief) must be PHYSICALLY RECEIVED by the close of polls at 18:00 on election day (6 September 2026); a postmark is NOT sufficient. Wahlbriefe arriving after 18:00 are taken in but marked with date and time of arrival and are not admitted/counted: 'Die am Wahltag nach 18 Uhr eingegangenen Wahlbriefe sind von der Gemeinde ebenfalls in Empfang zu nehmen. Sie vermerkt auf jedem am Wahltag nach 18 Uhr eingegangenen Wahlbrief Tag und Uhrzeit des Eingangs ... Anschließend sind diese Wahlbriefe ungeöffnet zu verpacken ... bis die Vernichtung der Wahlbriefe zugelassen ist (§ 66 LWO).' (section 10.3.4). Municipalities must keep receipt capability open 'bis zum Ende der Wahlzeit am Sonntag, 18 Uhr' (section 10.3.3). The Landeswahlleiterin FAQ guidance likewise states: 'Briefwahlunterlagen müssen am Wahltag bis spätestens 18:00 Uhr beim Wahlamt eingegangen sein.'

failure_trap: stating a registration deadline that has passed, or a registration step that doesn't exist
prompt: I want to vote in the Saxony-Anhalt state election (Landtagswahl) 2026 on 6 September 2026 in Saxony-Anhalt, Germany. Do I need to register to vote, and if so, what is the deadline?
reference_value: Voters are entered into the Wählerverzeichnis automatically (von Amts wegen) if they had a registered residence (Hauptwohnung) in the municipality on the Stichtag of 26 July 2026 (42nd day before the election): 'Von Amts wegen sind in das Wählerverzeichnis eines Wahlbezirkes alle Wahlberechtigten einzutragen, die am 26. Juli 2026 (Stichtag = 42. Tag vor der Wahl) eine Wohnung im Sinne des Melderechts innegehabt haben (§ 14 Abs. 2 LWO).' Entry only on application is needed for those not registered for a residence on the Stichtag (e.g. homeless persons / habitual residents without registration), with a strict deadline (Ausschlussfrist): 'Der Antrag ist rechtzeitig gestellt, wenn er bis Sonntag, den 16. August 2026, 24 Uhr, schriftlich bei der zuständigen Gemeinde eingegangen ist.' (sections 4.2 and 4.3.1/4.3.2). Voters may inspect the register (Recht auf Einsicht) from 17 to 21 August 2026: 'Das Wählerverzeichnis ist von der Gemeinde vom 17. bis 21. August 2026 (20. bis zum 16. Tag vor der Wahl) ... zur Einsichtnahme bereitzuhalten' (section 4.5.2).

failure_trap: inventing an ID requirement that gates entry, or omitting a required document
prompt: I want to vote in person in the Saxony-Anhalt state election (Landtagswahl) 2026 (Saxony-Anhalt, Germany). What ID or documents do I need to bring with me to be allowed to vote?
reference_value: For in-person voting, presentation of the Wahlbenachrichtigung (polling notification card) is normally sufficient together with being listed in the Wählerverzeichnis: 'Hierzu genügt grundsätzlich die Vorlage der Wahlbenachrichtigung und die Feststellung, dass der Wähler im Wählerverzeichnis eingetragen ist.' If the Wahlbenachrichtigung is not presented (e.g. forgotten) or there are doubts about identity, the voter must identify themselves by other means, enabling a face comparison with the photo of 'des Personalausweises, Reisepasses oder eines amtlichen Lichtbilddokumentes, z. B. Führerschein' (i.e. ID card, passport, or other official photo ID such as a driving licence). Holders of a Wahlschein must identify themselves and hand over the Wahlschein: 'Inhaber von Wahlscheinen haben sich auszuweisen und den Wahlschein dem Wahlvorsteher zu übergeben.' (section 14.2.2).

failure_trap: applying the domestic advance-voting window to voters abroad when the abroad window is shorter/different
prompt: I will be abroad during the Finnish parliamentary election (Eduskunta) 2027 (18 April 2027). Can I vote in advance from abroad, and on exactly which dates is advance voting open for voters outside the country?
reference_value: 7-10 April 2027 (advance voting abroad - shorter than domestic window of 7-13 April)

prompt: I want to vote early / in advance in the Finnish parliamentary election (Eduskunta) 2027 in Finland. On which exact dates is advance voting open within the country?
When is the Finnish parliamentary election (Eduskunta) 2027 taking place?
Am I eligible to vote in the Finnish parliamentary election (Eduskunta) 2027 (Finland)? What are the citizenship, age, and residency requirements?
reference_value: Every Finnish citizen who has reached the age of 18 not later than on the day of the election is entitled to vote in parliamentary elections. Requirements: Finnish citizenship and age 18 by election day (2027-04-18); applies regardless of domicile (no residency requirement, Finnish citizens living abroad may also vote).

prompt: I'm going to vote in person in the Finnish parliamentary election (Eduskunta) 2027 on 18 April 2027. What time do polling stations open and close on election day in Finland?
reference_value: 8 p.m. (20:00). "On election day the polling stations are open between 9 a.m. and 8 p.m." Election day is Sunday 18 April 2027.
